pages.title: Warrior
pages.text: Combat primary. Nine items — the leanest catalogue. Combat classes are balanced against each other, not against the craft classes.$(br2)Generic weapons and plate live with $(l:classes/armorer)Armorer$(/l) and $(l:classes/blacksmith)Blacksmith$(/l). Warrior owns only its signature gear.

pages.title: Catalogue
pages.text: $(bold)Warrior Armor.$(/) Iron-block plastron, chain pauldrons. Head, chest, legs, feet.$(br2)$(bold)Berserker Armor.$(/) Netherite-ingot torso, full netherite reinforcement. Head, chest, legs, feet.$(br2)$(bold)Warrior Spell Book.$(/) Iron-block and goat horns bound around an enchanted book. No other source.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: Netherite Warrior and Berserker variants stay vanilla smithing upgrades from the bases you craft.$(br2)Matching trader: the Armorer.
